info.description: Backend as a Service with flexible collections and document management
info.title: Cocobase API

post.description: Authenticate an app user with email and password

get.description: Get Google OAuth URL for authentication

post.description: Create a new app user account

get.description: Get the currently authenticated app user's details

patch.description: Update the currently authenticated app user's details

get.description: Get all app users for the current project
Get a specific app user by their ID

post.description: Verify Google access token obtained by frontend
Create a new collection with optional permissions
Create a new document with collection specified as query parameter (Python API compatibility)
Upload a file to Backblaze B2 storage with storage limit checking

delete.description: Delete a file from project storage

get.description: List all files uploaded to project storage
Retrieve a collection by its ID or name

delete.description: Delete a collection and all its documents

patch.description: Update a collection. Use helper function, invalidate cache after update.

get.description: List all documents in a collection with filtering, sorting, and concurrent optimizations. Returns array directly.

post.description: Create multiple documents in a single transaction. Optimized for bulk inserts.
Delete multiple documents at once. Single query for optimal performance.
Update multiple documents at once. Batch operation reduces queries.
Create a document and automatically upload files to S3, adding URLs to the document

parameters.description: Field name to store file URL (defaults to 'file_url')
parameters.name: file_field

get.description: Get a single document by ID. Removed cache decorator for security. Uses helper function with eager loading.

delete.description: Delete a document. Uses helper function, synchronize_session=False, invalidate cache after deletion.

patch.description: Update a document. Merges data instead of replace (safer). Invalidate cache after update.

get.description: Perform aggregation operations (count, sum, avg, min, max) on document fields

parameters.description: Aggregation operation (count, sum, avg, min, max)
parameters.name: operation

get.description: Count documents matching filters without returning the documents. Useful for pagination and statistics.
Group documents by a field and count occurrences
Analyze collection and return inferred schema with field types and detected relationships
WebSocket endpoint for real-time document changes. Send API key as first message.
Get statistics about active WebSocket connections
WebSocket for channel-specific peer-to-peer notifications. Send auth: {"api_key": "YOUR_API_KEY", "channel": "chat-room-1"}
WebSocket for global peer-to-peer notifications. Send auth message: {"api_key": "YOUR_API_KEY"}

post.description: Send a notification to global or channel subscribers

get.description: Get statistics about active notification connections
Get WebSocket connection statistics for all collections

github_com_patrick_cocobase_internal_dto.description: Login credentials for app user authentication
App user data returned in API responses
Signup data for creating a new app user
Fields to update on the authenticated user
JWT token and user data returned after successful authentication

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and API key.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
